38.reason: Error: loop condition should be i<lena, not i<=lena, because lena is the index of the last element, not the count. This causes out-of-bounds access.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: loop condition should be i<lena, not i<=lena, because lena is the index of the last element, not the count. This causes out-of-bounds access.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: loop condition should be i<lena, not i<=lena, because lena is the index of the last element, so the loop runs one extra iteration accessing out-of-bounds memory
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  should be i<lena; causes out-of-bounds access
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: Loop should be i < lena, not <=, because lena is the count of terms (indices 0 to lena-1). Using <= accesses uninitialized a[lena].
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Off-by-one error: 'lena' stores the count of terms, so valid indices are 0 to lena-1. Using '<=' accesses uninitialized memory at a[lena]. Should be 'i < lena'.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  循环条件错误，应为 i<lena，使用 <= 会导致数组越界并引入未初始化的零项参与计算
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition should be i < lena, not i <= lena, because lena is the count of terms and indices go from 0 to lena-1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition should be i < lena, not i <= lena. This causes out-of-bounds access to a[lena], which is uninitialized.]

49.reason: Logical error: using -1 as a deletion marker is unsafe because a valid polynomial coefficient could legitimately be -1, causing it to be incorrectly skipped during output.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  using -1 as marker may drop legitimate coefficient -1
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Logical error: using -1 as a deletion marker is unsafe because a valid polynomial coefficient could legitimately be -1, causing it to be incorrectly skipped during output.

45.reason: Error: The combination logic is flawed. It does not correctly merge all same-exponent terms because it only checks earlier indices and can corrupt terms that become marked -1. Also, using -1 as a sentinel is unsafe because a valid coefficient could be -1.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Error: The combination logic is flawed. It does not correctly merge all same-exponent terms because it only checks earlier indices and can corrupt terms that become marked -1. Also, using -1 as a sentinel is unsafe because a valid coefficient could be -1.
